title: Public repo checklist: pre-release audit for secrets and PII
desc: Before making kiexpert/wkappbot public, audit committed files for secrets/PII, strip hq data from tracking, scrub commit history, finalize LICENSE/README/AGENTS.
steps: Audit .gitignore: ensure bin/wkappbot.hq/, runtime/, *.exe, *.jsonl, *.log, *.bak are excluded. Check 'git ls-files' for any hq/ or runtime/ files accidentally committed. Run: git ls-files | grep -E 'hq/|runtime/|\.jsonl$|\.log$'

Scrub commit history: use git filter-repo or BFG to remove any accidental secrets or personal data. Check git log --all --full-history -- '*slack*' '*token*' '*secret*'. Run wkappbot gc --sweep to clean up orphaned objects after history rewrite.
Finalize LICENSE (MIT), README.md (install guide, basic usage), AGENTS.md (agent policy). Ensure CLAUDE.md doesn't expose internal Slack workspace names or private URLs.

CI SECURITY WORKFLOWS ADDED (2026-04-29): .github/workflows/security-scan.yml -- TruffleHog (trufflesecurity/trufflehog@main) + Gitleaks (gitleaks/gitleaks-action@v2) on push+PR+weekly. Also: CodeQL (github/codeql-action@v4) weekly on csharp/**. Branch protection: linear history, no force-push (requires public repo or Pro). Secret scanning + push protection via gh repo edit --enable-secret-scanning --enable-secret-scanning-push-protection.
author: claude
